Text: At its meeting on 5 May 2023, the Committee, having been informed by the State party on 22 December 2021 that the complainants no longer faced a risk of removal from Finland as they had been granted asylum, and having subsequently received a request for discontinuance, which the complainants accepted on 30 December 2021 owing to the successful resolution of their case, decided to discontinue the consideration of communication No. 907/2019.
